description: Refactor the 'SecureDataTransmitter' class in the 'network-module' project to use delegation instead of inheritance from 'LegacySocket'. The class should no longer extend 'LegacySocket'. Implement a delegate field for 'LegacySocket' and delegate only the 'sendData' and 'close' methods. Ensure that unsafe methods 'connectInsecure' and 'getRawStream' are no longer exposed by 'SecureDataTransmitter'.
